title: Botsqath #1218
definition:
Bozkath or Boscath = "rocky height"

 1) a city in Judah in the lowlands toward the Philistines, home of
    Josiah's mother
nasbUsage:
Definition: Bozkath or Boscath = "rocky height"

 1) a city in Judah in the lowlands toward the Philistines, home of
    Josiah's mother

    NASB:  a city in Judah
